title: Assembly Layer
description: Schema for a single layer within an Assembly DNA object

order.description: Stacking order — 1 is the lowest (substrate-side) layer

role.description: Functional role of this layer in the assembly stack

material_family.description: Material family identifier linking to layer_types.json

thickness_mm.description: Nominal thickness in millimeters; may be a fixed value or min/max range

required.description: Whether this layer is mandatory in all configurations of the assembly

attachment_method.description: Primary method used to attach or install this layer

notes.description: Optional installation or specification notes for this layer

compatible_layers_above.description: Layer role types that are permitted directly above this layer

compatible_layers_below.description: Layer role types that are permitted directly below this layer
